name: Axalta Coating Systems, LLC
h1: Axalta Coating Systems's GCC footprint in India
lede: Axalta Coating Systems runs three centers across two Indian cities. Vadodara and Gurugram, covering R&D, CoE and GCC/GIC, built over nine years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Axalta Coating Systems office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Axalta Coating Systems GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Axalta Coating Systems runs 3 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Vadodara, Gurugram), covering R&D, CoE and GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Axalta Coating Systems's India footprint covers Vadodara and Gurugram, spanning R&D, CoE and GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seven decision-makers, in one profile.
